# Mann Scanning Centre

> NABH Accredited Diagnostic Imaging Centre in Jalandhar, Punjab, India

## About

Mann Scanning Centre is a premier NABH-accredited diagnostic imaging facility located at 201 Gujral Nagar, Jalandhar, Punjab 144002, India. The centre provides advanced medical imaging and diagnostic services using state-of-the-art equipment with expert radiologist interpretation.

## Key Information

- Name: Mann Scanning Centre
- Website: https://mannscan.in
- Location: 201 Gujral Nagar, Jalandhar, Punjab 144002, India
- Phone: +91-181-5087888
- Email: mannscan@gmail.com
- Accreditation: NABH (National Accreditation Board for Hospitals & Healthcare Organizations)
- Languages: English, Hindi, Punjabi

## Services

- MRI (Magnetic Resonance Imaging) - 1.5 Tesla Siemens MAGNETOM Amira
- CT Scan (Computed Tomography) - 128-Slice Dual-Source
- Digital X-Ray
- Ultrasound / Sonography
- Color Doppler Studies
- 2D Echocardiography (2D Echo)
- TMT (Treadmill Test / Stress Test)
- Mammography

## Medical Team

- Dr. Gurpreet Singh Mann - Director & Senior Radiologist (MBBS, MD Radiology)
- Dr. Mandeep Kaur - Consultant Radiologist (MBBS, MD Radiology)
- Dr. Rajiv Kumar - Consultant Cardiologist (MBBS, MD Medicine, DM Cardiology)

## Equipment

- MRI Scanner: Siemens MAGNETOM Amira 1.5T (Advanced Tim+Dot technology)
- CT Scanner: 128-Slice Dual-Source CT
- Digital X-Ray: High-resolution digital radiography system
- Ultrasound: High-end multiprobe ultrasound system

## Fellowship Program

Mann Scanning Centre offers a Fellowship in Radiology program for medical professionals. Applications are currently open. Visit https://mannscan.in/fellowship.html for details and to apply.

## Online Tools

- LMP (Last Menstrual Period) Calculator: Obstetric calculation tool available at https://mannscan.in/lmp-calculator.html
- DICOM Viewer: View medical imaging files online

## Operating Hours

- Monday to Saturday: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM
- Sunday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM
- Emergency services available 24/7

- Home: https://mannscan.in/
- About: https://mannscan.in/about.html
- Services: https://mannscan.in/services.html
- Fellowship: https://mannscan.in/fellowship.html
- Contact: https://mannscan.in/contact.html
- LMP Calculator: https://mannscan.in/lmp-calculator.html
